eas_text: A civil authority has issued A REQUIRED WEEKLY TEST for the following counties or areas: Fayette; Ohio; Daviess; Madison; Franklin, KY; at 8:36 PM on APR 27, 2019 Effective until 8:51 PM. Message from DASDEC.
